src: Run macOS on QEMU/KVM. With OpenCore + Monterey + Ventura + Sonoma support now! Only commercial (paid) support is available now to avoid spammy issues. No Mac system is required.
ja: QEMU/KVM 上で macOS を実行。OpenCore + Monterey + Ventura + Sonoma をサポート。スパム的な Issue を避けるため商用（有償）サポートのみ提供。Mac システム不要。
